data.content: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-04-24T01:18:22.051Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project using dotnet test.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run specific tests filtered by a trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-fc436257b9d9485999486c2571fa6604 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | head -60", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

toolArgs.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run filtered tests with verbose output

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run filtered tests with verbose output

data.reasoningText: The output seems empty. Let me try again with more verbose output to see what's happening.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-fc436257b9d9485999486c2571fa6604 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" -v normal 2>&1", "description": "Run filtered tests with verbose output", "initial_wait": 30}

toolArgs.description: Run filtered tests with verbose output

data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax where `Category` maps to xUnit's `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute. All 5 matching tests succeeded in ~1s.
